response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scanned video for vocal music. 2. Identified only instrumental background music and spoken dialogue. 3. Confirmed no vocal songs were present. 4. Broken the video into two distinct visual scenes: the static opening display and the subsequent skit.
response.global_summary: The video opens with a static image of the VTuber group 'Justice' accompanied by instrumental theme music, followed by a skit featuring a mother and daughter talking about the group.

scenes.description: Static image of the four VTubers of the 'Justice' generation. Instrumental theme music is playing throughout.
A skit featuring a mother and daughter interacting, with spoken dialogue. The instrumental theme music continues in the background.
